title: Anfängerpraktikum "Data Science and NLP"
organisation: Faculty of Mathematics and Computer Science
further_info: Information about both beginners, advanced and master’s practicals our group offers in the summer semester 2026 will be presented in a single session online on April 15, 2026, at 2:15pm via Webex. Please enroll for the software practicals via Müsli at https://muesli.mathi.uni-heidelberg.de/lecture/view/2132 We will provide the link to the online session via the forum in Müsli.
